name: @basics/desktop
description: Basichome cross-platform desktop shell (Electron) — wraps the cloud/web renderer with an overlay pill, tray, and global shortcut. Runs on macOS and Windows.

build.//icon: electron-builder auto-generates per-platform app icons (icns/ico) from build/icon.png (1024x1024). The runtime BrowserWindow icon also references build/icon.png.
build.//extraResources: Bundles the Lens capture daemon INSIDE the app (one download). Drop the per-platform compiled daemon (lens / lens.exe, built from the lens repo) into desktop/vendor/lens/ before building; it lands at resources/lens/ where lens-client.findLensBinary() looks first.
